title: Katarn-class boarding shuttle

The 28 [[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long '''''Katarn''-class boarding shuttle''' was a [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] design made with a nose-end [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]]. It could carry up to 50 troops and 500 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] of equipment, with a crew requirement of 3 people.

==Characteristics==
[[File:KatarnBoardingShuttle-PP.png|thumb|left|200px|A side view]]
The enhanced structure of the shuttle allowed for the ramming of enemy vessels. [[Plasma torch/Legends|Plasma torches]] mounted around the airlock could then open up a hole, which the airlock would seal itself around. In less than two [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]], boarding troops would be able to deploy into the target vessel.

The ''Katarn''-class' only armament was one double laser cannon mounted at the front.

==History==
''Katarn''-class shuttles were often stationed aboard [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigates]] when in the Imperial forces.

Both [[Marines (SpecForce)|SpecForce Marines]] and [[Imperial Navy Trooper/Legends|Imperial Navy troopers]] used the ''Katarn'' in boarding actions.<ref name="RoE" />
